SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.expander

Class TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.expander.TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope extends Object implements Serializable
TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope (P6) generalises a single turndown line into a two-dimensional operating-envelope sweep over inlet pressure and feed flow rate. For each grid point it runs the coupled TurboExpanderCompressor model and records:
  • Feasibility — whether the power balance solved with the shaft speed inside its mechanical limits.
  • Surge margin — the compressor Q/N ratio relative to a configurable surge Q/N limit (proxy for distance to surge).
  • Cold-end temperature — the expander outlet temperature, the key cryogenic design constraint.
  • Hydrate margin — expander outlet temperature minus the hydrate formation temperature at the outlet pressure (only when the fluid carries water).

The resulting contour maps are emitted through toJson() so they can be consumed directly by the NeqSim report generator and plotted as feasibility / surge / cold-end-T / hydrate-margin contour plots.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope

      public TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope()
      Default constructor.

    • TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope

      public TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope(TurboExpanderCompressor machine)
      Constructs an operating-envelope sweep for the given machine.
      Parameters:
      machine - the turbo-expander-compressor to sweep

  • Method Details

    • setGrid

      public void setGrid(double[] inletPressures, double[] flowRates)
      Set the inlet pressure and feed flow grids for the sweep.
      Parameters:
      inletPressures - inlet pressure grid in bara
      flowRates - feed flow grid in kg/hr

    • run

      public void run()
      Run the two-dimensional sweep and populate the result grids. The machine inlet stream is set to each pressure/flow combination, the model is run, and the feasibility, surge margin, cold-end temperature and hydrate margin are recorded.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the machine or grid has not been configured

    • calcHydrateMargin

      private double calcHydrateMargin(StreamInterface stream)
      Compute the hydrate margin (stream temperature minus hydrate formation temperature) for the expander outlet stream. Returns Double.NaN when the fluid carries no water or the hydrate calculation does not converge.
      Parameters:
      stream - the expander outlet stream
      Returns:
      the hydrate margin in deg C, or Double.NaN if not available

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Build a map of the operating-envelope results suitable for JSON export and reporting.
      Returns:
      an ordered map of the grid axes and result grids

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serialise the operating-envelope results to JSON.
      Returns:
      a pretty-printed JSON string of the envelope result grids

    • getFeasibility

      public boolean[][] getFeasibility()
      Get the feasibility grid.
      Returns:
      the feasibility grid [pressure index][flow index], or null if not yet run

    • getSurgeMargin

      public double[][] getSurgeMargin()
      Get the surge-margin grid.
      Returns:
      the surge-margin grid [pressure index][flow index], or null if not yet run

    • getColdEndTemperature

      public double[][] getColdEndTemperature()
      Get the cold-end temperature grid.
      Returns:
      the cold-end temperature grid in deg C, or null if not yet run

    • getHydrateMargin

      public double[][] getHydrateMargin()
      Get the hydrate-margin grid.
      Returns:
      the hydrate-margin grid in deg C, or null if not yet run

    • getShaftSpeed

      public double[][] getShaftSpeed()
      Get the shaft-speed grid.
      Returns:
      the shaft-speed grid in rpm, or null if not yet run

    • setMachine

      public void setMachine(TurboExpanderCompressor machine)
      Set the machine to sweep.
      Parameters:
      machine - the turbo-expander-compressor

    • setSurgeQnLimit

      public void setSurgeQnLimit(double surgeQnLimit)
      Set the compressor surge Q/N ratio limit used for the surge-margin calculation.
      Parameters:
      surgeQnLimit - the surge Q/N ratio limit

    • setSpeedLimits

      public void setSpeedLimits(double minAllowableSpeed, double maxAllowableSpeed)
      Set the allowable shaft-speed range for the feasibility check.
      Parameters:
      minAllowableSpeed - the minimum allowable speed in rpm
      maxAllowableSpeed - the maximum allowable speed in rpm
